title: StringIdMapping
description: A mapping from an input gene/protein identifier to a STRING protein identifier.

queryIndex.description: Zero-based index of this identifier in the original query

stringId.description: STRING protein identifier in taxonId.ENSP format

ncbiTaxonId.description: NCBI taxonomy identifier of the matched protein's organism

annotation.description: Short functional annotation for the protein
examples: Cellular tumor antigen p53; Acts as a tumor suppressor...
